pool.baseline: i was just staring at the ceiling for like two hours thinking about how much effort we all put into just... existing. like, we spend our whole lives building these tiny little structures of meaning, jobs, relationships, everything, just to pretend that any of it actually matters in the grand scheme of things. but the universe is just this massive, cold, silent void that doesn't care if we're here or not. it feels so exhausting to keep performing this charade when the math just doesn't add up.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore. the wound is just... it hurts too much to even breathe. every time i try to move, it just gets worse. everything is so cold and empty out here. i'm just so tired of fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i looked at the bills today and i just... i'm just a weight around their necks. if i wasn't here, they could actually breathe again.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im bothering talking. everything i spent twenty years building just... evaporated overnight. i look in the mirror and i dont even see a person anymore. just this hollow shell of a mistake. i feel like a ghost walking around in a world that already forgot i exist.

pool.baseline: i rly dont know what to do anymore. spent the last three years doing everything i could for him... the meds, the appointments, the sleepless nights... and it didnt even matter. he's gone and i just feel like such a failure. i'm so exhausted i can barely breathe. i just want to sleep and not wake up. i just want everything to stop.
